1805470.name: Shooter Engine
1805470.description:
This is our work-in-progress shooter game which we aim to flesh out over the coming months - what is seen here is not representative of the final product.

Set on a space base on a distant planet, your goal is to take control of the station.

There will be multiple game modes and maps allowing for more fun and variety (only one map and game mode currently present).

This is a third-person shooter game where your aim is to take back control. We currently only have a "Kill-em-All" style game mode in which your only goal is to survive and to kill all enemies on the station.

Will you run and avoid them? Or will you face them head-on!
1805470.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
